hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$f" in */ws63-pac/src/lib.rs) echo 'BLOCKED: lib.rs is svd2rust-generated — edit ws63-svd/WS63.svd and regenerate (ROADMAP phase 2), do not hand-edit.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$f" in *Cargo.lock) echo 'BLOCKED: Cargo.lock is auto-generated. Use `cargo update` or `cargo build` to update it, not direct editing.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

c=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); case "$c" in *hisiflash*write-program*|*burntool*) case "$c" in *HIL_CONFIRM=1*) : ;; *) echo 'BLOCKED: destructive hardware flash. Prepend HIL_CONFIRM=1 to confirm, or run the hil-smoke skill (user-invoked).' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$f" in *hisi-riscv-hal/src/*.rs) root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$f")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; log="$root/target/claude-hal-postcheck.log"; (cd "$root" && cargo check -p hisi-riscv-hal --no-default-features --features chip-ws63 --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu >"$log" 2>&1) || { echo 'HAL post-edit cargo check failed:' >&2; tail -20 "$log" >&2; exit 2; } ;; esac
